summary: P0-02 Sitemap Production Hardening Testing Complete. Backend sitemap routes return 200 + valid XML with correct host resolution from request/env. Sitemap covers home, categories, listings, info/trust/corporate pages. Host report shows wrong_host=0 for both preview and prod. Frontend canonical meta working correctly.

minor.issue: Transient 502 gateway errors during pytest run (resolved on retry)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: _resolve_public_base_url() correctly resolves host from PUBLIC_BASE_URL env or x-forwarded-host header - no hardcoded hosts
PASS: _canonicalize_path() removes trailing slashes consistently (except root /)
PASS: CanonicalRouteSync in App.js updates link[rel=canonical] on route changes
PASS: normalizeCanonicalUrl in seoCanonical.js handles path normalization correctly

success_rate.backend: 89% (17/19 tests passed, 2 failed due to transient 502)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-02 Sitemap hardening verified. Sitemap routes use request-based host resolution (no hardcoding). Sitemap sections: core (static pages + vasita), categories (/kategori/*), listings (/ilan/*), info (/bilgi/* + /trust + /kurumsal + /seo). Frontend canonical synced via CanonicalRouteSync component.

SITEMAP_ROUTES_200_XML./api/sitemap.xml: PASS - Returns sitemapindex XML with 4 sections
SITEMAP_ROUTES_200_XML./api/sitemaps/core.xml: PASS - Returns urlset with static paths + vasita
SITEMAP_ROUTES_200_XML./api/sitemaps/listings.xml: PASS - Returns urlset with /ilan/* paths for active listings

HARDCODED_HOST_REMOVED.no_localhost: PASS - No localhost or 127.0.0.1 in sitemap output
HARDCODED_HOST_REMOVED.no_hardcoded_domain: PASS - No hardcoded annoncia.com or emergentagent.com in code
HARDCODED_HOST_REMOVED.host_from_request: PASS - Host resolved from PUBLIC_BASE_URL env or x-forwarded-host header

SITEMAP_CONTENT_COVERAGE.active_listings: PASS - /ilan/* for active+published listings in listings.xml

CANONICAL_DETERMINISTIC.trailing_slash_standard: PASS - No trailing slashes except root
